message:
perf(index): use HashSet for O(1) duplicate doc_id detection in TwoTierIndexBuilder

Replace linear O(n) duplicate checks (.iter().any()) with O(1) HashSet
lookups when inserting records into the fast and quality tiers. Two new
fields, fast_ids and quality_ids, track previously inserted document IDs
so that duplicate detection no longer requires scanning the entire
records vector. This significantly improves builder performance when
indexing large numbers of documents, as the prior approach degraded to
O(n^2) overall insertion cost.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
